methods.name: Stage-Progression
methods.rationale: Applies typical Series B → next-stage step-up multiplier (1.9x) to $72M total raised proxy.

methods.name: Peer-Median
methods.rationale: Median across 6 same-sector + same/adjacent-stage peers in Chips & Semiconductors. Range: $500M - $5.0B.

methods.name: Public-Comp Anchoring
methods.skip_reason: target revenue not on file (private companies rarely disclose)
methods.rationale: Public Semiconductors P/S median is 25.3x across 3 tickers. Cannot apply without target's revenue.

private.name: Positron AI
private.rationale: Same sector (Chips & Semiconductors), same stage (Series B), post-money $1B+

data.narrative:
Lumotive is a Series B semiconductor company that has raised $72M to date. The valuation analysis draws from a comp universe of 8 private peers in chips and semiconductors at the same or adjacent stage, alongside 3 public semiconductor benchmarks (ALAB, NVDA, AMD).

Two triangulation methods are applicable. Stage-Progression analysis applies a typical 1.9x step-up multiplier from Series B forward, yielding $137M. Peer-Median analysis across 6 same-sector comparables—including Positron AI ($1.0B, Series B), d-Matrix ($2.0B, Series A), Etched ($5.0B, Series A), Substrate ($1.0B, Series A), and DEEPX ($529M, Series C)—produces a median valuation of $1.0B, with an observed range of $500M to $5.0B. Public-comp anchoring via P/S multiples (sector median 25.3x) is inapplicable owing to the absence of disclosed revenue data. The analysis does not support application of revenue multiples at this stage.

The triangulated range is $116M (low) to $1.1B (high), with a median of $568M. The wide dispersion reflects material uncertainty around comparable stage alignment and the volatility within the frontier-chip peer set. Stage-Progression suggests a more conservative $137M entry, while peer medians anchor toward $1.0B. Key downside drivers include earlier-stage classification versus peers; key upside drivers include potential for market position within the AI infrastructure stack, though this cannot be quantified from available data.
